articles.title: NIH Purges COVID Lab Leak Pioneer Ralph Baric After Cover-Up Exposed
articles.summary: The NIH has removed Ralph Baric—the University of North Carolina researcher whose gain-of-function work helped create the pandemic—from ALL federal grants after his ties to COVID origins became undeniable. This is retaliation disguised as accountability, protecting the real architects while sacrificing their frontman.

articles.title: Fauci's Right-Hand Man Indicted for Hiding COVID Research Communications
articles.summary: Dr. David Morens, 78-year-old former Fauci advisor, faces federal charges for using private email to dodge public records laws while orchestrating the COVID cover-up from inside NIH. The smoking gun evidence of deliberate concealment finally surfaces—but where are the charges against his boss?

articles.title: Senator Johnson Exposes Biden Officials' COVID Vaccine Safety Cover-Up
articles.summary: GOP Senator Ron Johnson drags Biden administration officials into the hot seat over suppressed COVID vaccine safety signals. The CDC and FDA have been sitting on adverse event data while Americans suffered in silence—classic regulatory capture in action.

articles.title: Revolutionary Manifesto Exposes Century of Medical Tyranny and Holistic Healing Suppression
articles.summary: "Echoes of Courage" documents the systematic destruction of natural medicine from the Flexner Report to modern FDA persecution of alternative therapies. This manifesto names the corporate-government alliance that has criminalized healing for profit—required reading for medical freedom fighters.

articles.title: Oral Microbiome Predicts Lifespan—Why Your Doctor Ignores This Life-Saving Science
articles.summary: Groundbreaking research proves mouth bacteria imbalances predict accelerated aging, cancer, and heart disease even without obvious gum disease. The medical establishment ignores this systemic health window because there's no patentable drug—just basic oral hygiene that Big Pharma can't monetize.

articles.title: Fasting Durably Reprograms T Cells—Nature Study Reveals Nutritional Immunotherapy Gold Mine
articles.summary: Nature publishes definitive proof that fasting and refeeding creates persistent immune enhancement in both mice and humans through metabolic reprogramming. This validates ancient healing wisdom while pointing toward nutritional interventions that threaten the cancer industry's chemotherapy monopoly.

articles.title: Mitochondrial Healing Cures Chronic Nerve Pain—Big Pharma's Opioid Scam Exposed
articles.summary: Natural mitochondrial repair protocols successfully treat diabetic neuropathy, fibromyalgia, and chemo-induced nerve damage—conditions that generate billions in opioid profits. The medical establishment pushes addictive painkillers while suppressing cellular healing that actually works.

articles.title: NAD+ Precursor Cures Rare Blood Disorder—Nature Medicine Validates Anti-Aging Supplement
articles.summary: Phase 2 trial proves low-dose nicotinamide mononucleotide (NMN) restores platelet counts in immune thrombocytopenia by boosting NAD+ levels. This validates the longevity supplement industry while exposing why the FDA has tried to ban NMN—it actually works without Big Pharma's permission.

articles.title: The Alzheimer's Amyloid Fraud That Swallowed $1.6 Billion in NIH Funding
articles.summary: Sylvain Lesné fabricated Western blot images cited over 2,300 times. For 16 years, NIH chased a fraudulent hypothesis while metabolic and vascular researchers were defunded. Patients were enrolled in trials targeting a fake biomarker. Science Magazine broke it in 2022. Nobody went to jail.

articles.title: Vioxx — Merck Internal Emails Prove They Knew About Cardiovascular Risk Years Before Withdrawal
articles.summary: Internal Merck documents revealed executives were aware of Vioxx's elevated heart attack risk as early as 2000. An estimated 88,000 to 140,000 Americans suffered serious cardiac events before the drug was pulled in 2004. The FDA approved it anyway and kept it on market for years after warning signs emerged.

articles.title: Grant Denied — NIH Reviewer Note: 'Findings Contradict Current Policy Position'
articles.summary: A University of California researcher's NIH R01 application was rejected with a reviewer comment explicitly noting that the findings contradict current policy positions on dietary fat guidelines. The study had passed peer review at two journals. The institutional suppression of inconvenient science is now documented and on record.

articles.title: Sugar / Fat Coverup: Harvard Scientists Named in 1967 Sugar Industry Documents
articles.summary: Internal documents from the Sugar Research Foundation published in JAMA Internal Medicine reveal that Harvard scientists were paid to shift blame for heart disease from sugar to dietary fat. The landmark 1967 review they produced shaped five decades of flawed dietary guidelines and contributed to the global obesity epidemic.

articles.title: Study 329: GlaxoSmithKline Published Teen Antidepressant Trial as Positive While Internal Data Showed Harm
articles.summary: Paxil Study 329 showed the drug was no more effective than placebo in adolescents and increased suicidality. GSK published it as a success. It took 15 years, an academic reanalysis, and a $3 billion DOJ settlement to fully unravel. Thousands of teenagers were prescribed a drug the manufacturer knew didn't work and caused harm.

articles.title: Thomas Seyfried: Cancer Is a Metabolic Disease — Zero Pharma Funding, Remarkable Results
articles.summary: Boston College researcher Thomas Seyfried has spent three decades building the case that cancer is primarily a metabolic disease, not a genetic one. His ketogenic and fasting-based press-pulse protocols show results in glioblastoma that NIH-funded gene therapy approaches have not matched. NIH won't fund it because there's no patentable drug at the end of it.

articles.title: Chris Palmer MD: Mental Illness Is a Metabolic Disease — Mitochondria, Not Serotonin
articles.summary: Harvard psychiatrist Chris Palmer's Brain Energy theory proposes that virtually all mental illness — from depression to schizophrenia to bipolar disorder — stems from mitochondrial dysfunction. His documented cases of patients achieving remission through metabolic intervention are extraordinary. NIMH has zero interest because there is no drug at the end of the protocol.

articles.title: Rapamycin, Metformin, Senolytics: Cheap, Off-Patent, and Completely Ignored by NIH
articles.summary: Multiple cheap, off-patent compounds show dramatic longevity extension and disease reversal in animal models. The TAME trial had to be privately funded because NIH refuses to classify aging as a treatable condition. Pharma has no interest because none of these compounds can be patented.
